name: worldweft
description: An open foundation for durable, evolving agent worlds in Godot.

scripts.godot:check-agent-soak-long: GODOT_SOAK_TICKS=24 GODOT_SOAK_DELAY_MS=500 GODOT_SOAK_CONTEXT_ACTORS=12 GODOT_SOAK_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS=60000 GODOT_SOAK_MAX_RUNTIME_MS=1200000 GODOT_SOAK_MAX_TOTAL_RESPONSE_BYTES=128000000 GODOT_SOAK_REQUIRE_MEMORY_DELTA=1 GODOT_SOAK_REQUIRE_RELATIONSHIP_DELTA=1 node godot-taixu-client/tools/check_agent_soak.mjs
scripts.godot:check-lint: eslint --no-eslintrc --config godot-taixu-client/.eslintrc.cjs convex/godot.ts convex/godotBridgeAuth.ts convex/godotBridgeContract.ts convex/godotCapabilities.ts convex/godotExchange.ts convex/godotMapBoundary.ts convex/godotMapPages.ts convex/godotPresentation.ts convex/godotReadModel.ts convex/godotSpatial.ts convex/godotTesting.ts convex/godotTestingPolicy.ts convex/godotViewerPolicy.ts convex/http.ts convex/xianxia/access.ts convex/xianxia/actionIdempotency.ts convex/xianxia/actions.ts convex/xianxia/agent.ts convex/xianxia/agentTickLease.ts convex/xianxia/agentTickLeasePolicy.ts convex/xianxia/agentTickScheduler.ts convex/xianxia/durableContracts.ts convex/xianxia/events.ts convex/xianxia/groupScene.ts convex/xianxia/growth.ts convex/xianxia/memory.ts convex/xianxia/movement.ts convex/xianxia/qinglan.ts convex/xianxia/qinglanProfiles.ts convex/xianxia/quests.ts convex/xianxia/schema.ts godot-taixu-client/tools/*.mjs
scripts.godot:check-unit: NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest convex/godotBridgeAuth.test.ts convex/godotBridgeContract.test.ts convex/godotCapabilities.test.ts convex/godotExchange.test.ts convex/godotMapBoundary.test.ts convex/godotPresentation.test.ts convex/godotSpatial.test.ts convex/godotTestingPolicy.test.ts convex/godotViewerPolicy.test.ts convex/xianxia/access.test.ts convex/xianxia/actionIdempotency.test.ts convex/xianxia/agentTickLeasePolicy.test.ts convex/xianxia/agentTickScheduler.test.ts convex/xianxia/durableContracts.test.ts convex/xianxia/memoryFanout.test.ts convex/xianxia/qinglanFangshiZones.test.ts convex/xianxia/qinglanNavigation.test.ts convex/xianxia/qinglanProfiles.test.ts
scripts.godot:check-core: npm-run-all godot:check-source godot:check-static godot:check-soak-policy godot:check-unit godot:check-contracts
